\"MELIA: I found this book while rummagi: "MELIA: I found this book while rummaging around some debris underneath Gearen City.
I was able to find writing utensils at t: I was able to find writing utensils at the old broken down store a few days back so I'm going to use this to note time.
Because, honestly, with no way to discer: Because, honestly, with no way to discern time in any way... It's garbage.
I have no way to tell the time right now: I have no way to tell the time right now, so at the time of this entry I will declare it 12:00 AM. A new day.
We all failed the mission. We fought aga: We all failed the mission. We fought against Team Xen and lost.
I don't know what, but it wiped half of: I don't know what, but it wiped half of us out.
I survived, and then there was a flash o: I survived, and then there was a flash of bright light.
The world shook and the castle fell on t: The world shook and the castle fell on top of us.
I thought I died in the collapse, but I: I thought I died in the collapse, but I woke up to this place.
The castle was gone-- No, everything was: The castle was gone-- No, everything was gone.
Except for one thing. One person. \\v[70: Except for one thing. One person. \v[701].
Out of everyone... Why them? I can't sta: Out of everyone... Why them? I can't stand looking at their face.
Because it shares the same one with \\PN: Because it shares the same one with \PN.
The person I hate the most... \\PN. Stuc: The person I hate the most... \PN. Stuck in this place with \PN...
Is this the price of my sins?\": Is this the price of my sins?"
\"MELIA: Entry 21. Even as I note down t: "MELIA: Entry 21. Even as I note down the time, I feel myself to be unreliable.
I can't tell the time unless I dot down: I can't tell the time unless I dot down every single second that goes by.
Clearly, I have the time to complete a t: Clearly, I have the time to complete a task, but not the motivation.
It could have been 24 hours since entry: It could have been 24 hours since entry 1. It could have been 24 months.
I can't tell anymore. All I know is that: I can't tell anymore. All I know is that it's cold and this place never ends.
\\v[701] believes that if we keep going: \v[701] believes that if we keep going we'll find an out, eventually.
But everything we've come across suggest: But everything we've come across suggests otherwise.
All I do now is ponder about how I could: All I do now is ponder about how I could have lived my life differently.
I was always the shy girl who didn't go: I was always the shy girl who didn't go to parties and only battled when prompted.
I had to change a bit when Spacea and Ti: I had to change a bit when Spacea and Tiempa "saved" me.
I became more stern and tried to be a le: I became more stern and tried to be a leader, but that failed miserably.
If I was a normal girl again I'd go out: If I was a normal girl again I'd go out to parties and do things I wasn't supposed to just to get a feel of life again.
If I had a second chance I'd live my lif: If I had a second chance I'd live my life the opposite of what I lived.
...Or actually, maybe I don't want to do: ...Or actually, maybe I don't want to do any of those things.
We always want what we can't have. Would: We always want what we can't have. Would I even enjoy those things if given the chance?
Is any of this even worth thinking about: Is any of this even worth thinking about... I dunno anymore."
I think it's been over a year at this po: I think it's been over a year at this point. Maybe more. I won't rant about time again.
\\v[701] and I walked down this endlessl: \v[701] and I walked down this endlessly long tunnel today.
I think it was some railnet system, but: I think it was some railnet system, but it didn't look like anything from Aevium.
Eventually we got to a place called the: Eventually we got to a place called the Onyx Ward.
There was what appeared to be a school t: There was what appeared to be a school there, but it was completely run down.
When we walked outside, the scenario com: When we walked outside, the scenario completely changed.
We were at what appeared to be Oceana Pi: We were at what appeared to be Oceana Pier, but...
The water had completely run dry and the: The water had completely run dry and the ships were grounded.
Sometimes we find something interesting,: Sometimes we find something interesting, I guess, but most of the time it's just waiting for the world to change again.
Those parts are where I feel the most pa: Those parts are where I feel the most pain."
After all this time I just realized that: After all this time I just realized that the pages in this book don't end.
I can flip all the pages at once and get: I can flip all the pages at once and get to the back of the book easily.
But when I start to turn each individual: But when I start to turn each individual page over... It won't end.
I've counted. There were over a thousand: I've counted. There were over a thousand pages.
At some point I couldn't keep counting. I just accepted it for what it is.
...Come to think of it, the ink in this: ...Come to think of it, the ink in this pen I found has been working for an extremely long time too.
What if time isn't passing at all? What: What if time isn't passing at all? What if we've been at a standstill? Everything stops?
Are we stuck in the 11th hour forever? I: Are we stuck in the 11th hour forever? Is that why nothing will fade?
I tried... Ending things for myself toni: I tried... Ending things for myself tonight.
At least, if I do it to myself.
I wonder if they could pull it off if th: I wonder if they could pull it off if they tried?
They'd never try, though... Maybe they w: They'd never try, though... Maybe they would if I provoked them.
If I put them in a situation where it's: If I put them in a situation where it's me or them... Would they have the gall to do it?
Maybe I can end both of our suffering, s: Maybe I can end both of our suffering, somehow.
And if it doesn't work, will we just be: And if it doesn't work, will we just be in even more pain?
I want to see the color red again. It wa: I want to see the color red again. It was so pretty...
So pretty, and different. Maybe it's ugl: So pretty, and different. Maybe it's ugly and different.
I want to see it again. I want to see \\: I want to see it again. I want to see \PN again. Hehe."
\v[701] went out on their own again.
All I do is sit and think about things. I wait for them to come back and tell me they found nothing.
Last night we found the remnants of what: Last night we found the remnants of what appeared to be a train station from Grand Dream City.
Though, I don't remember Grand Dream Cit: Though, I don't remember Grand Dream City even having a rail system.
This world is so similar, yet so differe: This world is so similar, yet so different. It's confusing.
When \\v[701] comes back, I might kill t: When \v[701] comes back, I might kill them. Just for fun.
I mean, I'm pretty sure we can't die her: I mean, I'm pretty sure we can't die here. But I've kind of wanted to try it.
Right now we're both nothing. I could be: Right now we're both nothing. I could be something.
A murderer, I guess, but does murder eve: A murderer, I guess, but does murder even exist here?
I could beat them to a pulp and laugh ab: I could beat them to a pulp and laugh about it and move on.
Then I'd be down here alone. But what's: Then I'd be down here alone. But what's so bad about that?
Maybe I can walk and walk forever until: Maybe I can walk and walk forever until my skin falls off my body and I collapse into dust.
Oh, who am I kidding? That won't happen. I'd be lucky if a nail got chipped.
I'm really going to hurt them tonight. J: I'm really going to hurt them tonight. Just because they look like \PN.
If I had the chance to hurt them, I woul: If I had the chance to hurt them, I would. If I had to the chance to do worse to myself I would.
Because then that would count as progres: Because then that would count as progression, right?
AEVIA: I had no idea she was in so much: AEVIA: I had no idea she was in so much pain, or that so much time had passed...
MELIA: I didn't know I could talk like t: MELIA: I didn't know I could talk like this...
AEVIA: It's... Okay. I didn't check up o: AEVIA: It's... Okay. I didn't check up on her enough.
I was so focused on \"escaping\"... But: I was so focused on "escaping"... But there isn't any escaping here.
Where we are, is just where we are.
MELIA: ...No. There is a way out.
AEVIA: ...If you mean how the \"other\": AEVIA: ...If you mean how the "other" you escaped... We don't know if that's really what happened.
MELIA: The \"me\" who wrote that book lo: MELIA: The "me" who wrote that book lost hope.
But I'm going to give you my word. I won: But I'm going to give you my word. I won't lose hope this time.
In a world like this... That's all we ca: In a world like this... That's all we can do right? Hope for a way out.
AEVIA: What can we even do?: AEVIA: What can we even do?
MELIA: This new floor opened for us... I: MELIA: This new floor opened for us... I'm making this tower our goal.
Let's work together and reach the top.
MELIA: Whatever is there... I know it's: MELIA: Whatever is there... I know it's hope.
It could take 6 days, or 6 weeks, or eve: It could take 6 days, or 6 weeks, or even another 6 years.
But if we work together, we can climb ou: But if we work together, we can climb out.
Let's work together so that we can see t: Let's work together so that we can see the ones we love again.
AEVIA: Even if we are able to escape... We'd just be back in our old problems.
MELIA: Then let's put our heads together: MELIA: Then let's put our heads together and think of a way out of all of this...
Guess we have enough time to be really t: Guess we have enough time to be really thorough, huh?
Let's work together for a new tomorrow. Let's push that 11 to 12.
